components.title: King's Canvas tool design
components.summary: Design the AI-enriched tool for aspiration, purpose, planning and reflection.

components.title: Lifecycle integration
components.summary: Embed Canvas from pre-entry and offer-holder engagement through induction, transitions, final year and graduation.

components.title: Rhythm within and beyond the curriculum
components.summary: Define when students revisit purpose, plans and opportunities across curriculum, advising, Careers and wider student life.

components.title: Human-supported use model
components.summary: Connect Canvas to advisers, tutors, Careers, KCLSU, subject societies and student-facing staff.

steps.title: Define the purpose conversation and lifecycle model
steps.summary: Set out what Canvas covers and where it sits from pre-entry to graduation.

steps.title: Design Canvas tools and prompts
steps.summary: Specify AI functionality, reflection prompts, planning tools, skills links and student outputs.

steps.title: Pilot across lifecycle moments
steps.summary: Test Canvas in induction, year transition, module choice, Careers engagement or final-year planning.

steps.title: Embed as a recurring rhythm
steps.summary: Build Canvas into curriculum, co-curriculum, advising, opportunity navigation, reflection and evidence capture.

dependencies.label: Needs the skills vocabulary and future skills mapping model.
Digital implementation should sit in the Single Student App / Digital Portal.
